description: Lock aviation chronology scope: powered flight, scheduled commercial aviation, and early air traffic control predate jet aircraft and mature radar-based aviation systems.

checks.reason: The powered-flight node is scoped to the Wright brothers' controlled, sustained powered flight.
The broad commercial-aviation node is scoped to scheduled passenger air service, not postwar jet airlines.
Powered aircraft are the concrete prerequisite/enabler for scheduled commercial air service.
Scheduled commercial aviation predates jet aircraft by decades.
Radar belongs to later aviation safety and traffic-management systems, not the first scheduled service.
The early ATC node is anchored to the radio-equipped Cleveland airport tower.
Early ATC used tower/radio/procedural control before radar became a later surveillance aid.
